answer: Nimble has a freemium model. Pro is $12/user/month with annual billing. Enterprise is custom.

results.title: Nimble Pricing | Plans and Cost
results.snippet: Nimble offers a free tier, a Pro plan at $12/user/month, and an Enterprise plan with custom pricing. Annual billing saves 20%.

results.title: Nimble Pricing Review 2026 - G2
results.snippet: Users rate Nimble pricing 3.8/5. Common feedback: free tier is generous but Pro limits are reached quickly.
